query: SELECT sp.localId, sp.name, sp.photoUri, bo.businessSlug FROM service_packages sp JOIN business_owners bo ON sp.businessOwnerId = bo.id WHERE bo.businessSlug = 'wellness-suite' LIMIT 10;
